creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is most likely due to the fact that a new package set 
was uploaded to the master server and the two mirrors that 
together are ftp.freebsd.org take different times to catch 
up fromt he master server.  This should resolve itself in 
the next few hours.  Until then, you can either use one of 
the mirrors specifically, or even better, use a mirror 
closer to you, like ftp.nl.freebsd.org 

Thanks for your report.  Please let me know if you still 
have problems by morning.
